title: Fix CLI release upload keys and multipart failures

source.subject: ci: fix release upload keys and avoid multipart failures

body:
Fixes **CLI release upload keys** and avoids multipart upload failures against object storage.

## Provenance

- **Completed:** 2026-04-22

## Catalog scope

## Relation
Release hardening under **ci-release**.
